attributes-to-ignore-regex.name: attributes-to-ignore-regex
attributes-to-ignore-regex.displayName: Attributes to Ignore by Regular Expression

attributes-to-log-regex.name: attributes-to-log-regex
attributes-to-log-regex.displayName: Attributes to Log by Regular Expression

properties.mapping Patient_BirthSex:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Gender / Sex' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Gender / Sex" AS originalValue,
		'Patient_BirthSex' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Patient:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Population" AS	DiagnosticCategoryOriginal,
		"Gender / Sex" AS BirthSexOriginal,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS BirthSexEucaim
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Radiotherapy:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"ProcedureRadiotherapy1_ProcedureIdentifier" AS	ProcedureIdentifier,
		"ProcedureRadiotherapy1_PerformedDate" AS PerformedDate
FROM FLOWFILE
WHERE "Procedure1_IsRadiotherapy" IS NOT NULL
properties.Episode:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Episode_Type" AS	TypeOriginal,
		"Episode_StartDate" AS StartDate
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Treatment1 Episode:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Treatment1_Episode_PatientIdentifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Treatment1_Episode_Type" AS	TypeOriginal,
		"Treatment1_Episode_StartDate" AS StartDate
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Surgery:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"ProcedureSurgery1_ProcedureIdentifier" AS	ProcedureIdentifier,
        "ProcedureSurgery1_PerformedDate" AS PerformedDate
FROM FLOWFILE
WHERE "Procedure1_IsSurgery" IS NOT NULL
properties.mapping ImagingProcedure_ProcedureCode:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Imaging procedure (MRI. CT MRI+CT)' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Imaging procedure (MRI. CT MRI+CT)" AS originalValue,
		'ImagingProcedure_ProcedureCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "ImagingProcedure_ProcedureCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Primary Cancer Condition:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		CAST(REPLACE("PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeAtDiagnosis", ',', '.') AS DOUBLE) AS AgeOfDiagnosis,
		'Year' AS AgeUnitOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeUnitConcept" AS AgeUnitEUCAIM,
		"Topography : Organ" AS BodySiteOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteCode" AS BodySiteEUCAIM,
		"ImagingProcedure_ProcedureIdentifier" AS ConfirmedByProcedure,
		"Pathology / Histological Type" AS HistologyMorphologyBehaviourOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehaviourCode" AS HistologyMorphologyBehaviourEUCAIM
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Tumor_BodySite:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Topography : Organ' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Topography : Organ" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping PrimaryCancerCondition_Histology:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Histological subtype' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Histological subtype" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehaviourCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehaviourCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.ImagingProcedure1:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"ImagingProcedure_ProcedureIdentifier" AS	ProcedureIdentifier,
        "ImagingProcedure_PerformedDate" AS PerformedDate,
		"Imaging procedure (MRI. CT MRI+CT)" AS ImagingProcedureOriginal,
		"ImagingProcedure_ProcedureCode" AS ImagingProcedureEUCAIM
FROM FLOWFILE

labels.label:
Loop 3 for clinical data:
* Clinical data tabular inputs are mapped and converted to a relational model.
* Mappings are specified during the Data Holder's analysis phase.
